ddls:
CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the author */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "literary_works" (
  "work_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each literary work */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the literary work */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary author of the work */,
  "co_author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the co-author of the work (optional) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the work was published */,
  "creation_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the work record was created */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Word count of the literary work */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN number of the literary work */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_literary_works_co_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("co_author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_literary_works_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent genre (optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_genres" (
  "work_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the literary work */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary genre of the work */,
  "sub_genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sub-genre of the work (optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "work_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the literary work sold */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the literary work sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated from the sale */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the sale occurred */,
  "sale_channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., online, offline, bookstore) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_id") REFERENCES literary_works ("work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "work_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the literary work being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_id") REFERENCES literary_works ("work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_dates" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication record */,
  "work_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the literary work published */,
  "pub_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "edition" TEXT /* Edition of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_dates_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_id") REFERENCES literary_works ("work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "work_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the literary work that received the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_id") REFERENCES literary_works ("work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., editor, reviewer, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, view work) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the theme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_themes" (
  "work_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the literary work */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the theme of the work */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_id", "theme_id")
)
